testcase.name: test_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('user' in {'email': 'rrhh.milchollos@gmail.com', 'name': 'Ivan Rubio Cano', 'picture': testcase.name: test_deposit_to_account
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_manobank_admin_iteration_19.py:167: in test_deposit_to_account assert response.status_code == 200, f"Deposit failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Deposit failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_withdraw_from_account
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_manobank_admin_iteration_19.py:183: in test_withdraw_from_account assert response.status_code == 200, f"Withdraw failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Withdraw failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_compliance_summary

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('entity_name' in {'entity': {'cif': 'B19427723', 'license_type': 'Entidad de Dinero Electrónico', 'name': 'ManoBank S.A.', 'regulator': 'Banco de España'}, 'generated_at': '2026-01-24T17:06:20.388371+00:00', 'recent_high_risk': [], 'stats': {'events_today': 0, 'high_risk_events': 0, 'total_audit_events': 0}} or 'regulated_entity' in {'entity': {'cif': 'B19427723', 'license_type': 'Entidad de Dinero Electrónico', 'name': 'ManoBank S.A.', 'regulator': 'Banco de España'}, 'generated_at': '2026-01-24T17:06:20.388371+00:00', 'recent_high_risk': [], 'stats': {'events_today': 0, 'high_risk_events': 0, 'total_audit_events': 0}})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_manobank_admin_iteration_19.py:212: in test_compliance_summary assert "entity_name" in data or "regulated_entity" in data E AssertionError: assert ('entity_name' in {'entity': {'cif': 'B19427723', 'license_type': 'Entidad de Dinero Electrónico', 'name': 'ManoBank S.A.', 'regulator': 'Banco de España'}, 'generated_at': '2026-01-24T17:06:20.388371+00:00', 'recent_high_risk': [], 'stats': {'events_today': 0, 'high_risk_events': 0, 'total_audit_events': 0}} or 'regulated_entity' in {'entity': {'cif': 'B19427723', 'license_type': 'Entidad de Dinero Electrónico', 'name': 'ManoBank S.A.', 'regulator': 'Banco de España'}, 'generated_at': '2026-01-24T17:06:20.388371+00:00', 'recent_high_risk': [], 'stats': {'events_today': 0, 'high_risk_events': 0, 'total_audit_events': 0}})
